_doc: Free-credits-on-timer system. interval_hours = how often a gift becomes claimable. chips_amount = how many credits are awarded. claim_animation tunes the chip-cascade flying from gift button to balance pill (consumed by lobby_manager._spawn_chip_cascade and shop_overlay._spawn_chip_cascade). notification.* are reserved for future push-notification integration. To hide the gift button entirely, use configs/features.json -> ui_visibility.show_lobby_gift_button.

notification._doc: Reserved for push-notification integration. Currently UNUSED — no push system wired.
